title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TechSaksham - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TechSaksham - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
TechSaksham invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TechSaksham:
TechSaksham is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham!
